script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
Sleeping in on weekends is sabotaging your Monday.

[PROBLEM 2-8s]
You think you're "catching up" on sleep.
But your body clock just shifted 2 hours.

[REFRAME 8-18s]
It's called social jetlag.
Every 1 hour of weekend shift = flying 1 timezone.
You're jet-lagged every Monday.

[TIP 18-24s]
Keep your wake time within 90 minutes of weekday.
Saturday included.

[CTA 24-30s]
VOLT Sleep gives you 1 action per day to fix this. Free. Link in bio.
caption: ** Weekend sleep-ins aren't recovery. They're jet lag. How much later do you wake on weekends?

script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
Your body doesn't know it's Saturday.

[PROBLEM 2-6s]
You sleep until noon.
You feel great... until Monday.

[REFRAME 6-16s]
Your circadian clock runs on light and wake time.
When you shift your schedule by 3 hours on Saturday,
your body spends Sunday and Monday trying to catch up.

[TIP 16-24s]
The 90-minute rule: never wake more than 90 minutes later
than your weekday alarm. Even on vacation.

[CTA 24-30s]
Link in bio — free energy profile in 30 seconds.
caption: ** Your body runs on rhythm, not weekdays. What's your weekend wake time?

script:
[HOOK 0-2s]
Your Monday brain fog starts on Saturday morning.

[PROBLEM 2-8s]
Every Monday you're sluggish, unfocused, slow.
You blame the alarm. Or the meeting.

[REFRAME 8-18s]
But the damage happened 48 hours earlier
when you slept 3 hours later than usual.

[TIP 18-24s]
This Saturday: set an alarm 90 minutes after your weekday time.
Get up. Get light. Watch what Monday feels like.

[CTA 24-30s]
I built an app that tracks this for you. 30 seconds. Free.
caption: ** What if your worst Monday was caused by your best Saturday? Try the 90-minute rule this weekend.
